steps.title: Find total ounces
steps.content:
Each scone needs $3.5$ ounces of blueberries, and the baker makes $40$ scones.

$$3.5(40)=140$$

So the baker needs $140$ ounces.

steps.title: Convert to pounds
steps.content: There are $16$ ounces in $1$ pound, so divide by $16$. $$\frac{140}{16}=8.75$$ The answer is A.
